positive: A minimalist, abstract silhouette design featuring a celestial body (like a stylized moon or nebula swirl) interacting with a natural element, such as a sprawling branch of enchanted foliage or a geometric ocean wave. The composition should be centrally focused, utilizing negative space effectively. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau meets modern graphic design. Colors: Limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, muted gold, and stark white/cream. Lighting: Flat, even, and graphic, ensuring strong lines and clean silhouettes suitable for textile printing. Composition should feel balanced and harmonious, suitable for a print on clothing.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, copyright, cropped, bad anatomy, low detail, artifact, blurry, grainy, noise, extra limbs, messy, realistic photo, photorealism, people
